name: Proellex
description: Proellex is an orally-available, selective progesterone receptor modulator, is in development to alleviate symptoms associated with both uterine fibroids and endometriosis.
indication: For the treatment of uterine fibroids and endometriosis.
mechanismOfAction: Proellex selectively blocks the progesterone receptor thus avoiding the adverse effects of GnRH agonists associated with the induction of a low estrogen, menopausal-like state in women.
pharmacodynamics: Patients receiving Proellex saw improvements in key symptoms associated with uterine fibroids, namely reduced pain and bleeding, as well as effects on bone retention.
